full_name: Rolled steels for general structure - grade SS400
scope: General structural hot-rolled carbon steel used for plates, sheets, strips, sections and bars in construction, bridges and general machinery. 'SS' denotes structural steel and '400' the minimum tensile strength in N/mm2.

chemical_composition.note: JIS G3101 specifies only P and S limits for SS400 (chemistry otherwise controlled by mechanical properties). Typical ladle analysis, mass %.

license_note: composition/property data widely republished by independent free sources, not the copyrighted JIS document text
